COMMENT: Each of the digits identify a specific item of interest to users of the MEDPAR file. Warning indicators 1 
and 6, and the first two values of indicator 8, are set early in the process – while processing all claims 
through the final action algorithm, prior to the creation of the stay record. The other indicators are 
derived from the claims
